positive: Central composition of majestic, stylized bioluminescent forest fauna and flora; featuring intricate glowing moth wings overlapping giant lily pads, surrounded by graceful, winding ferns and crystalline mist. The artwork uses a dark, nocturnal palette accented by vibrant cyan, magenta, and electric lime green highlights. Style: Highly detailed, vector-art inspired illustration blended with ethereal digital painting. The silhouette must be strong and readable for apparel printing. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, filling the frame cleanly. Lighting: High contrast, glowing luminescence emanating only from the subjects, giving depth and drama. Medium: High-resolution, scalable print artwork.
negative: blurry, ugly, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, logo, realistic photo, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, out of frame, cropped
